title: Italian-Style Crispy Polenta Cake
description: A crispy, buttery, and satisfying Italian-inspired dish, made with crispy polenta and topped with a crunchy crumble. Serve as a side or snack.
instructions: Grate the buttery norweigian cheese and set aside.
In a medium bowl, combine the crispy polenta and grated cheese.
In a separate bowl, mix the masarepa with a pinch of salt.
Add the masarepa mixture to the polenta mixture and stir well.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 8-inch round cake pan.
Top the cake with the crumble topping.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cake is crispy and golden brown.
Let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
